title: System type, delegated API, Steppable/Serializable/Renderable
manager: The System type — a container of wired machines that presents a delegated API and the shared Steppable/Serializable/Renderable interfaces, so a whole system steps, snapshots, and renders through one uniform surface. This is what lets a five-hundred-machine system be driven exactly like a single machine, and it is the interface the web components auto-detect to render either one without special-casing.
cs: System type + delegated API; Steppable/Serializable/Renderable shared interfaces (wc auto-detects); the uniform surface over a wired system (§22).
